settings.heading: 5mm Foamex Sign Boards
settings.description: Premium 5mm Foamex PVC sign boards (rigid foam boards) with high-definition UV printing. Waterproof, weather resistant and lightweight — perfect for shop signs, event displays and estate agent boards. Available in A5, A4, A3, A2 and A1.

settings.heading: Buy Now — Foamex Board Sizes
settings.description: Order a standard size in seconds. Pay securely, then upload your artwork.
settings.note: 5mm premium Foamex, full-colour UV print with a free artwork check. Prices are per board. Buy more and save — see bulk pricing below.

settings.heading: Bulk Pricing — Buy More, Save More
settings.description: Ordering multiple boards? Prices per board drop as your quantity goes up.
settings.note: Bulk discounts are applied automatically in your basket when you order 2 or more of the same size. For 50+ boards, contact us for a bespoke quote.

settings.question: What are Foamex sign boards?
settings.answer: Foamex (also called foam board, PVC sign board or rigid sign board) is a lightweight but rigid PVC board. Ours are 5mm thick with a smooth matt finish, ideal for professional signage indoors and outdoors.

settings.question: Are they suitable for outdoor use?
settings.answer: Yes. Our boards are waterproof, weather resistant and fade resistant, so they perform well outdoors as well as indoors.

settings.question: How thick are the boards?
settings.answer: All sizes are printed on premium 5mm Foamex, which is rigid enough to stand up to daily use while staying lightweight and easy to mount.

settings.question: Do you offer bulk discounts?
settings.answer: Yes. Prices per board reduce as your quantity increases — see the bulk pricing table above. For orders of 50 or more, contact us for a bespoke quote.

settings.question: How do I supply my artwork?
settings.answer: Pay securely first, then upload your artwork on our Upload Artwork page. We accept PDF, AI, EPS, JPG and PNG files, and every order includes a free artwork check.

settings.heading: Ready to order your Foamex signs?
settings.description: Upload your artwork or get in touch for a bespoke quote.

settings.heading: Optional Extras & Design Services
settings.description: Add finishing options or let our team handle your artwork. Just add them to your basket alongside your order.
settings.note: Add-ons are optional and added separately to your basket.
